summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProfitPilot financial tracker app. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads correctly with proper UI components, login works perfectly, but registration has a form validation issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form validation prevents submission - name field validation error even when filled

integration_issues.issue: Registration form does not submit successfully due to client-side validation

passed_tests: Backend API /api/auth/login returns 200 with valid credentials
Backend API /api/auth/register creates new users successfully
Backend API /api/auth/me returns user profile when authenticated
Backend API handles invalid credentials with 401 response
Backend API handles duplicate registration with 400 response
Backend API validates missing fields with 500 response
Login page loads at /login with proper UI elements
Login form accepts user input and submits successfully
User can login with test@test.com / password123
After login, user is redirected to /dashboard
Dashboard shows user name in greeting: 'Welcome back, Test User!'
Dashboard displays all 4 KPI cards with financial data
Navigation between login and register pages works
Registration page loads at /register with proper form elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form validation issue - the name field validation is preventing form submission even when the field is properly filled. Check form validation logic in the registration component.
